summary.required_screen: A patched-ROM screen where the Hashi bridge/stage/location label is visibly displayed.
summary.rule: Byte matches can guide capture work, but they do not approve visual review without the expected visible screen context.

next_action.why: This row is already changed by the primary IPS, so visual review moves the current patch closer to release-readiness.
next_action.record_visual_review: python scripts/record_primary_visual_review.py 0x0569D --confirm --screen-context "look for a bridge/stage/location label visible"

existing_auto_input_evidence.visual_route_note: Converted PNG confirms the auto-input route reached an in-game dialogue screen; this is not yet final patched-Korean visual approval.
existing_auto_input_evidence.context_rejection_reason: The existing auto-input PNG reaches an in-game dialogue/background scene; it is not a clear bridge/stage/location label screen.
